changes: New competitor: Van Demon Performance (vandemonperformance.com.au) — Shopify API scraper, no browser needed
Vandemon products automatically get the correct vendor name, 'Vandemon - ' title prefix, and brand combo tags (e.g. Vandemon Kawasaki Exhaust)
Fixed year range tags for shorthand formats like '2018-26' — now correctly expands to all years in the range
Scrape report: select products and add custom tags before uploading to Shopify
Scrape report: generate SEO-optimised product descriptions for selected products instantly — no API key needed
Watchlist: new Recheck All button to manually check all items for restocked variants
Watchlist: app now automatically rechecks all watchlist items in the background every time it launches
Watchlist: when all variants of a product come back in stock it is automatically moved to Gap Results
You can now pick a brand for AMX, MCAS, and Road Store directly in the app — no manual typing needed
Subcategories (e.g. Helmets, Jackets) load automatically when you select a brand
Brand and subcategory lists come pre-loaded in every update — ready to use straight away
Fixed Motoheaven subcategories not showing the correct categories
Fixed AMX subcategories disappearing after selecting a brand
Fixed a bug that stopped tags from saving when uploading products to Shopify
New Tag Manager — add and manage product tags in your Shopify store straight from the app
Smart tag suggestions based on what competitors are selling
Scan History — go back and review or export any past scan
Road Store (roadstore.com.au) can now be scanned as a competitor
Watchlist — save specific products to track price and stock changes over time
Export your gap analysis results to Excel with one click
MCAS (mcas.com.au) can now be scanned as a competitor
Scan just one brand at a time instead of the whole site
More accurate size detection for products with multiple variants
